issues.sample: Roof molding detached from driver's side of 2023 Land Rover Discovery Sport, upon arriving at home checked the passenger side and it came off without excerpting any force. Subsequent check on search engines indicate this may be a common occurrence in recent model Land Rover SUVs.

narrative.headline: What 2023 Land Rover Discovery Sport owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Structure (33% of reports).
